name: @prune/cache-habits
description: E3 — Cache-Habits Linter. Pre-action linter that inspects a proposed user action and warns BEFORE a documented prompt-cache-killer pattern fires. Composes @prune/intelligence reactive analyzers; adds the pre-emit rule layer that no Anthropic-engineer published habit currently has automated guard for. Deterministic rules, stable IDs, no model call, no regex.
